notes: All API calls use apiFetch() wrapper from @/lib/api — not raw fetch.
All WebSocket subscriptions use wsClient from @/lib/websocket.
All portal navigation is a single useState(activePage) toggling CSS display:block/none.
File uploads use FileReader for client-side preview only — no server upload in current build.
Hardcoded data arrays are flagged with hardcoded:true and the variable name.
Non-functional handlers are flagged with functional:false.

state.dealerTab: string — active tab in dealer-detail (9 tabs)
state.unitTab: string — active tab in unit-detail (5 tabs)
state.settingsTab: string — active sub-page in settings (7 sub-pages)
state.clTab: string — active tab in changelog (4 tabs)
state.unitEditMode: boolean — view vs edit mode in unit-detail

sections.description: Parts orders linked to this claim

actions.label: Assign FRC Code
actions.onClick: opens inline FRC lookup for a line
actions.note: UI present, no API call wired

tabs.label: Overview
tabs.content: dealer info cards: status, plan, claims count, wallet balance, joined date

tabs.label: Subscription
tabs.content: current plan, billing period, Stripe subscription ID

tabs.label: Activity Log
tabs.content: audit log entries for this dealer

tabs.label: Info
tabs.content: VIN, make, model, year, type, dealer; inline edit toggle via toggleUnitEdit()

tabs.label: Photos
tabs.content: display photo upload + inspection photos (DAF/PDI). updateOpUnitPhoto() uses FileReader — NOT server upload

edit_mode.save: NOT FUNCTIONAL — empty handler on Save Changes button

data.description: Overview cards for all service modules with status badges (Live, Q2 2026, Q3 2026, Q4 2026)

create-invoice.title: Create Invoice
create-invoice.description: Wave-style invoice builder with dynamic row add/remove via DOM innerHTML

users.title: Users & Roles
users.note: Duplicate page-users div exists in source (lines 1031-1053 and 1056-1078) — likely copy-paste artifact

stab-s-fees.label: Claim Fee Defaults
form_fields: Default Fee Type (% of approved / flat rate)
Bill on approval or on close (select)

actions.label: Submit Request
actions.onClick: showPage('changelog') — NOT FUNCTIONAL, no API call

state.isDealerOwner: boolean — user.role === 'dealer_owner'; defaults to true when not authenticated (prototype mode)
state.dlrClaims: array — claims for this dealer from API
state.dlrUnits: array — units for this dealer from API
state.dlrInvoices: array — invoices for this dealer from API
state.dlrStaff: array — staff for this dealer from API
state.dlrTickets: array — tickets for this dealer from API
state.unitTab: string — active tab in unit-detail (4 tabs: Info, Documents, Pictures, Claims)
state.dSettingsTab: string — active sub-page in settings (5 sub-pages)
state.dclTab: string — active tab in whats-new (4 tabs)
state.brandColor: string — hex color for primary brand color
state.accentColor: string — hex color for accent color

upload.title: Upload Photos / Push to Claim
upload.description: Photo upload workflow with unit selector and Push to Claim action

tabs.label: Info
tabs.content: VIN, make, model, year, type, warranty dates

tabs.label: Pictures
tabs.content: unit display photo upload — updateUnitPhoto() uses FileReader, NOT server upload

fields.label: Logo Upload
fields.handler: previewLogo() — FileReader DOM manipulation, NOT server upload

actions.label: Save & Apply
actions.onClick: applyBranding() — client-side CSS variable manipulation only, NO API call

actions.label: Preview
actions.onClick: previewBranding() — navigates to dashboard to show effect, NO API call

actions.label: Restore Defaults
actions.onClick: restoreBranding() — resets CSS variables to defaults, NO API call

tabs.label: Request a Feature
tabs.content: Form: Feature Title, Description, Priority, textarea — NOT FUNCTIONAL no API call

d-settings.title: Settings

actions.label: Save Changes
actions.onClick: updateProfileImage() for photo only — rest NOT FUNCTIONAL

d-settings.bug_note: Tab switching may have a prefix mismatch: setCustSettingsTab sets 'cs-profile' but display condition checks custSettingsTab === 'cstab-cs-profile'. Same pattern exists in DealerPortal dSettingsTab.

CustomerPortal.role_restrictions: none — all pages accessible to all authenticated clients

state.custUnit: object | null — first unit from API: (d.units || [])[0] || null

bugs.description: setCustSettingsTab sets values like 'cs-profile' but display conditions check custSettingsTab === 'cstab-cs-profile'. The 'cstab-' prefix mismatch means settings sub-pages may never render correctly.

cards.label: Unit Card
cards.content: custUnit display photo, year/make/model, VIN, dealer name, dealer phone

cards.label: Alerts
cards.content: warranty expiry warning, any open claims or tickets

cards.label: Manufacturer Warranty
cards.content: countdown bar + days remaining + expiry date

cards.label: Extended Warranty
cards.content: provider name + coverage period + countdown bar

data.note: Countdown bars are visual/CSS only — no live calculation

sections.label: Visual Timeline
sections.description: progress steps: Submitted → Under Review → Parts Ordered → Ready for Repair → Complete

report-issue.title: Report an Issue
report-issue.description: Creates a support ticket linked to a claim

fields.label: Attach Photos
fields.note: file input only, no handler wired

roadside.title: Roadside Assistance
roadside.content: Launch date badge, feature preview list (24/7 towing, battery jump, tire change, fuel delivery, lockout service)

quick-chat.title: Quick Chat
quick-chat.description: Casual messaging with dealer/operator. Separate from formal tickets.

data.messages: chatMessages array, updated via WebSocket ticket:message event

c-settings.title: Settings
c-settings.bug: Prefix mismatch: tabs set to 'cs-profile' but checked as 'cstab-cs-profile' — sub-pages likely never render

cs-profile.label: My Profile
form_fields: Profile Photo (FileReader DOM manipulation — NOT server)

actions.label: Save
actions.onClick: updateCustProfile() — photo FileReader only, form NOT FUNCTIONAL

BidderPortal.note: Standalone portal — no MobileBottomNav, no OfflineBanner. Simpler architecture.

state.isReadyToBid: boolean — cardAdded && (idUploaded || true) — ID optional for bids under $25k (per code comment)
state.profileSaved: boolean — resets to false after 3 seconds

timers.purpose: live countdown display on dashboard and upcoming page

websocket_subscriptions.effect: push new bid to myBids array

fields.label: Profile Photo
fields.handler: updateAvatar() — FileReader DOM manipulation, NOT server upload

actions.label: Save Profile
actions.onClick: handleSaveProfile() — client-side only, sets profileSaved=true for 3s, NO API call

verification.title: Verification
verification.description: Identity and address verification for auction bidding

fields.label: Upload Government ID
fields.handler: handleFileUpload('id') — sets idUploaded=true, NO server upload

fields.label: Upload Proof of Address
fields.handler: handleFileUpload('addr') — sets addrUploaded=true, NO server upload

verification.note: ID optional for bids under $25k — isReadyToBid = cardAdded && (idUploaded || true)

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Card management for auction deposits and purchases

actions.label: Add Card
actions.onClick: handleAddCard() — sets cardAdded=true + alert(), NO API call

dom_manipulation_not_server_uploads: OperatorPortal: updateOpProfile() — profile photo via FileReader
OperatorPortal: updateOpUnitPhoto() — unit display photo via FileReader
OperatorPortal: addServiceRow() / addPartRow() — invoice builder via innerHTML
DealerPortal: updateUnitPhoto() — unit display photo via FileReader
DealerPortal: updateProfileImage() — profile photo via FileReader
DealerPortal: previewLogo() — logo upload via FileReader
DealerPortal: applyBranding() / previewBranding() / restoreBranding() — CSS variable manipulation only
CustomerPortal: updateCustProfile() — profile photo via FileReader
empty_handlers: OperatorPortal: Assign to Me (queue), Flag Photo, Submit to Manufacturer, Log Manufacturer Response, Approve Line, Deny Line, Add FRC Code, Edit FRC Code, most form Save buttons in settings
DealerPortal: Push to Claim, Save Draft (upload), Reply/Close Ticket, Add Staff Invite, staff Edit Role/Deactivate, Top Up Wallet, Change Plan, Cancel Subscription, feature request Submit

CustomerPortal: View Coverage Details, Renew Extended Warranty, Download (documents), Notify Me (roadside), Learn More / Purchase (protection plans), Send Reply / Close Ticket, New Password Update, notification Save

BidderPortal: handleSaveProfile() (shows success UI but no API), handleAddCard() (alert only), handleFileUpload() (sets boolean only), Register Interest, Increase/Withdraw Bid, View Details (won units), Delete Account (alert only), all settings save buttons
hardcoded_data_arrays: OperatorPortal: opFeatureRequests — feature requests table (6 rows)

known_bugs.description: Settings tab switching prefix mismatch: setCustSettingsTab sets 'cs-profile' but display conditions check custSettingsTab === 'cstab-cs-profile'. Sub-pages likely never render.
Duplicate page-users div at lines 1031-1053 and 1056-1078. Copy-paste artifact — renders the same content twice inside the same page.
Same tab prefix pattern as CustomerPortal — dSettingsTab may have same mismatch. Needs verification.
